_comment: Palette for tools/generate_highrises.gd. Trimmed to 4 genuinely tower-shaped (tall relative to footprint) variants after the first generation pass showed building-i/j/k/n ballooning to absurd widths (50m+) once scaled up to highrise height - those stay reserved for the specific named BuildingB/BuildingC roles at controlled one-off scale, not this randomized scatter.
